positive: A stylized celestial fox silhouette sitting gracefully on a stack of cosmic geometric shapes. The fox has flowing, ethereal tails and glowing, luminous eyes. The background features swirling nebulae, deep indigo and violet gradients, punctuated by distant, bright stars and delicate constellations. Use a blend of Art Nouveau fluidity and minimalist geometric patterns. Strong high-contrast black silhouette against richly colored, hyper-detailed cosmic gradient background. Clean linework, perfectly symmetrical composition, centered subject, perfect for apparel print, vibrant, ethereal, mystical, clean lines.
